title: zeltnera davyi
intro: Zeltnera davyi, also known as the white penstemon or white beardtongue, is a flowering plant species in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zeltnera davyi include its potential to alleviate digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Zeltnera davyi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
